prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit Spark's encrypted RPC and shuffle authentication path. Find the Java or Scala source files in apache/spark that (1) configure network encryption or SASL/auth settings, (2) build the secure transport or shuffle-service connection, and (3) enforce handshake failure handling when authentication or encryption negotiation breaks.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the spark-analytics fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Audit Spark's encrypted RPC and shuffle authentication path. Find the Java or Scala source files in apache/spark that (1) configure network encryption or SASL/auth settings, (2) build the secure transport or shuffle-service connection, and (3) enforce handshake failure handling when authentication or encryption negotiation breaks.

params.search_pattern: network encryption OR SASL OR shuffle OR handshake
